context.rawPrompt: help me fix a bug in our dark mode input field. for some reason both the background and htte text color of the typed text of the user is white or light grey. i cant read what i type

codeSurface.label: Surface Catalog
codeSurface.rationale: Prompt normalization identified Surface Catalog as the most likely code surface within intent-poc-app.

context.desiredOutcome: The input field in dark mode must have a high-contrast text color against the background, ensuring readability.
acceptanceCriteria: The input field background color is dark in dark mode.
The input field text color is light/white in dark mode.
The contrast ratio between text and background meets accessibility standards.

scenarios.title: Verify dark mode input field readability
scenarios.goal: Ensure text is visible when typing in dark mode
given: The application is set to dark mode
when: The user types text into the input field
then: The text color is clearly distinguishable from the background color
A screenshot verification confirms the contrast ratio is sufficient

activeWorkItems.title: Verify dark mode input field readability
activeWorkItems.description: Ensure text is visible when typing in dark mode
activeWorkItems.verification: A screenshot verification confirms the contrast ratio is sufficient
activeWorkItems.userVisibleOutcome: The text color is clearly distinguishable from the background color
verificationNotes: playwright coverage "Intent-driven flow for intent-poc-app" / "Verify dark mode input field readability" is a tracked read-only verification asset during implementation.

operations.rationale: Update the .dark-mode CSS to ensure the input field has a dark background and light text, improving contrast and readability in dark mode.
